name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax Title Loans at 1622 Bandera Rd Apt 1624, San Antonio, TX 78228 in the Near Northwest neighborhood is Mon-Fri 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 5.0 stars across 845 reviews. Call +1 210-526-8030.
description_long:
TitleMax is one of the largest title lending companies in the United States. The Summer Avenue Memphis location has been operating since February 2007, serving residents of the greater Memphis area with fast-access secured lending products. The company operates multiple locations across Memphis and is active in states including TN, TX, AZ, MO, MS, SC, ID, KS, DE, UT, and WI for its online unsecured product.

TitleMax offers two core product types at this location. The first is a Title Pledge and Flex Line of Credit: a secured loan using your clear vehicle title as collateral. Borrowers keep driving their vehicle during the loan term. Requirements include a clear vehicle title and a valid government-issued ID. The second product is an Unsecured Flexible Line of Credit, available both in-store and online, which requires a valid ID, an active bank account statement from within the past 60 days, and proof of income if recurring deposits are not visible. The flex structure on both products allows customers to withdraw funds over time up to their credit limit rather than in one lump sum.

This location is bilingual, open six days a week with extended Friday hours, and has accumulated over 481 Google reviews at a 5.0/5 average rating — an unusually high score for a title lender. Multiple staff members are named repeatedly in reviews for professionalism and customer education. The store is one of several TitleMax branches within a few miles, with locations on N. Cleveland Street, Lamar Ave, and Jackson Avenue also serving Memphis.

Honestly, TitleMax serves a narrow use case: vehicle owners who need cash fast and have exhausted lower-cost options. Title loans as a product category carry very high APRs — often 100% to 300% annualized — and the website does not disclose specific rates or fees, which is a significant transparency gap. Failure to repay risks vehicle repossession. The unsecured line of credit may carry lower rates than the title product, but again no rate range is published. This is a last-resort emergency product, not a general-purpose loan, and it is not appropriate for consumers who can qualify for a credit union loan or personal loan from a mainstream lender.
address: 1622 Bandera Rd Apt 1624, San Antonio, TX 78228

company_info.headquarters: 1622 Bandera Rd Apt 1624, San Antonio, TX 78228

pros: Same-day cash available with quick in-store approval
Accepts most credit types — vehicle equity can offset weak credit score
Borrower keeps driving their vehicle during the loan term
Flex line of credit allows draws over time rather than a single lump sum
Bilingual staff on-site at the Summer Avenue location
481+ Google reviews with a 5.0/5 average rating — unusually high for title lending
Also offers an unsecured line of credit as an alternative to title-secured products
cons: No APR or fee information disclosed anywhere on the store page — major transparency gap
Title loans carry high annualized interest rates typical of the industry (often 100–300% APR)
Vehicle repossession is a real risk if the borrower cannot repay
Online unsecured loans limited to 11 states; not available everywhere TitleMax operates
Closed on Sundays, which limits access for true weekend emergencies
best_for: Vehicle owners with a clear title who need same-day cash and cannot qualify for traditional credit
Borrowers with poor or thin credit histories who have been declined elsewhere
Consumers who need a flexible revolving credit line rather than a fixed lump-sum loan
Memphis-area residents who prefer in-person, bilingual service
diagnosis: TitleMax is appropriate for vehicle owners in the Memphis area who face a genuine cash emergency and have no access to lower-cost credit — not for routine borrowing. The main caveat is that title loans are among the most expensive consumer credit products available, APRs are undisclosed on this page, and non-payment puts the borrower's vehicle at direct risk of repossession.
services: Flex line of credit (secured, revolving, draw over time)
Online unsecured line of credit (select states: AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI)
Credit check (soft or hard — not specified, but most types accepted)
Customer online account portal for managing existing loans
